items.fromString: This feature provides a one-click method to set the goals and caps for the final flight of a line item.
items.toString:
This feature provides a one-click method to set the goals and caps for the final flight of a line item.

In situations where a flight does not deliver in full, campaign managers will need to go in and adjust their impression goal amounts to adjust for upcoming flights to make up for the underdelivery.

This table defines how values should be populated for each flight.

||Field||Pacing Type||Rule||User Action||
|*Impression Goal*|Pacing Towards Impressions|Does *not* auto-populate.|User must manually input the value.|
|*Impression Cap*|Pacing Towards Impressions|Calculates automatically based on the formula:{{Impression Goal * Impression Cap Multiplier}}|User can edit and override the automatically calculated value.|
|*Spend Cap*|Pacing Towards Spend|Does *not* auto-populate.|User must manually input the value.|

items.fromString:
This feature provides a one-click method to set the goals and caps for the final flight of a line item.

In situations where a flight does not deliver in full, campaign managers will need to go in and adjust their impression goal amounts to adjust for upcoming flights to make up for the underdelivery.

This table defines how values should be populated for each flight.

||Field||Pacing Type||Rule||User Action||
|*Impression Goal*|Pacing Towards Impressions|Does *not* auto-populate.|User must manually input the value.|
|*Impression Cap*|Pacing Towards Impressions|Calculates automatically based on the formula:{{Impression Goal * Impression Cap Multiplier}}|User can edit and override the automatically calculated value.|

items.toString:
This feature provides a one-click method to set the goals and caps for the final flight of a line item.

In situations where a flight does not deliver in full, campaign managers will need to go in and adjust their impression goal amounts to adjust for upcoming flights to make up for the underdelivery.

This “actualize remaining flight” button will help users auto-calculate the remainder impressions.

This table defines how values should be populated for each flight.

||Field||Pacing Type||Rule||User Action||
|*Impression Goal*|Pacing Towards Impressions|Does *not* auto-populate.|User must manually input the value.|
|*Impression Cap*|Pacing Towards Impressions|Calculates automatically based on the formula:{{Impression Goal * Impression Cap Multiplier}}|User can edit and override the automatically calculated value.|
|*Spend Cap*|Pacing Towards Spend|Does *not* auto-populate.|User must manually input the value.|
This work item links to "Wiki Page (System Confluence)"

items.fromString:
This feature provides a one-click method to set the goals and caps for the final flight of a line item.

In situations where a flight does not deliver in full, campaign managers will need to go in and adjust their impression goal amounts to adjust for upcoming flights to make up for the underdelivery.

This “actualize remaining flight” button will help users auto-calculate the remainder impressions.

This table defines how values should be populated for each flight.

||Field||Pacing Type||Rule||User Action||
|*Impression Goal*|Pacing Towards Impressions|Does *not* auto-populate.|User must manually input the value.|
|*Impression Cap*|Pacing Towards Impressions|Calculates automatically based on the formula:{{Impression Goal * Impression Cap Multiplier}}|User can edit and override the automatically calculated value.|
|*Spend Cap*|Pacing Towards Spend|Does *not* auto-populate.|User must manually input the value.|

In situations where a flight does not deliver in full, campaign managers will need to go in and adjust their impression goal amounts to adjust for upcoming flights to make up for the underdelivery.

This “actualize remaining flight” button will help users auto-calculate the remainder impressions.

This table defines how values should be populated for each flight.

||Field||Pacing Type||Rule||User Action||
|*Impression Goal*|Pacing Towards Impressions|Does *not* auto-populate.|User must manually input the value.|
|*Impression Cap*|Pacing Towards Impressions|Calculates automatically based on the formula:{{Impression Goal * Impression Cap Multiplier}}|User can edit and override the automatically calculated value.|
|*Spend Cap*|Pacing Towards Spend|Does *not* auto-populate.|User must manually input the value.|

items.fromString:
This table defines how values should be populated for each flight.

||Field||Pacing Type||Rule||User Action||
|*Impression Goal*|Pacing Towards Impressions|Does *not* auto-populate.|User must manually input the value.|
|*Impression Cap*|Pacing Towards Impressions|Calculates automatically based on the formula:{{Impression Goal * Impression Cap Multiplier}}|User can edit and override the automatically calculated value.|

items.toString:
This table defines how values should be populated for each flight.

||Field||Pacing Type||Rule||User Action||
|*Impression Goal*|Pacing Towards Impressions|Does *not* auto-populate.|User must manually input the value.|
|*Impression Cap*|Pacing Towards Impressions|Calculates automatically based on the formula:{{Impression Goal * Impression Cap Multiplier}}|User can edit and override the automatically calculated value.|
|*Spend Cap*|Pacing Towards Spend|Does *not* auto-populate.|User must manually input the value.|

h3. *Button Display Logic*

The *"Actualize Remaining Flight"* button will appear next to the TOTAL value *only when a single flight remains* in the line item. This includes scenarios where there is only one flight in total.

The button should be offset near, but to the right of the TOTAL value. Button should NOT be over that value

h3. *Button Action: On-Click*

When the user clicks the button, the following actions occur:

# *The remaining flight's goals and caps are automatically calculated as follows:*
#* *Impression Goal* = {{Total Impression Goal}} - {{Sum of All Other Flight Impression Goals}}
#* *Spend Cap* = {{Total Budget}} - {{Sum of All Other Flight Spend Caps}}
# *The button disappears* after the calculation is complete.

!blob:https://cadent.atlassian.net/23960f0b-1c24-4b59-9143-a1565f121337#media-blob-url=true&id=baecece3-8cb3-43e1-bb04-5c254bc761ca&contextId=26383286469&collection=contentId-26383286469|width=488,alt="Screenshot 2026-01-12 at 10.12.05 PM.png"!

items.fromString:
This feature provides a one-click method to set the goals and caps for the final flight of a line item.

In situations where a flight does not deliver in full, campaign managers will need to go in and adjust their impression goal amounts to adjust for upcoming flights to make up for the underdelivery.

This “actualize remaining flight” button will help users auto-calculate the remainder impressions.
items.toString:
The removal of auto-populate will be for the “Add Line Item” and “Edit Budget & Pacing” screens. This will not impact Order Inbox/Accept Order screen.

User preference is to be able to input the impression goal amount for each flight manually. Future iterations will consider the option of automatic distribution of impressions evenly or towards next flight, but current scope is to disable the auto-populate logic.



!Screenshot 2026-01-23 at 1.15.16 PM.png|width=821,alt="Screenshot 2026-01-23 at 1.15.16 PM.png"!



 one-click method to set the goals and caps for the final flight of a line item.

In situations where a flight does not deliver in full, campaign managers will need to go in and adjust their impression goal amounts to adjust for upcoming flights to make up for the underdelivery.

This “actualize remaining flight” button will help users auto-calculate the remainder impressions.

items.toString:
The removal of auto-populate will be for the following:

* new line item drawer
* line item budget edit
* order flights (as long as initial flight values are still fetched from the BE)

User preference is to be able to input the impression goal amount for each flight manually. Future iterations will consider the option of automatic distribution of impressions evenly or towards next flight, but current scope is to disable the auto-populate logic.



!Screenshot 2026-01-23 at 1.15.16 PM.png|width=821,alt="Screenshot 2026-01-23 at 1.15.16 PM.png"!

Additionally, there will be a notation below total row to inform users of the difference (display the 13,889 difference (50,000-36,111). 

!Screenshot 2026-01-23 at 3.22.25 PM.png|width=812,alt="Screenshot 2026-01-23 at 3.22.25 PM.png"!

Design’s mock of how impressions remaining would be surfaced:

!image-20260129-184501.png|width=1346,alt="image-20260129-184501.png"!

items.fromString:
This table defines how values should be populated for each flight.

||Field||Pacing Type||Rule||User Action||
|*Impression Goal*|Pacing Towards Impressions|Does *not* auto-populate.|User must manually input the value.|
|*Impression Cap*|Pacing Towards Impressions|Calculates automatically based on the formula:{{Impression Goal * Impression Cap Multiplier}}|User can edit and override the automatically calculated value.|
|*Spend Cap*|Pacing Towards Spend|Does *not* auto-populate.|User must manually input the value.|



*The remaining flight's goals and caps are automatically calculated and displayed as follows:*

# *Impression Goal* = {{Total Impression Goal}} - {{Sum of All Other Flight Impression Goals}}
# *Spend Cap* = {{Total Budget}} - {{Sum of All Other Flight Spend Caps}}



Validation should still the same - users can only save once the flight totals equal the line item total
